contracts.name: RenderingIntentContract
contracts.purpose: Defines the safe rendering intent input for Page04 compilation.

fields.name: render_contract_id
fields.description: Stable deterministic rendering contract identifier.

fields.name: project_id
fields.description: Owning project identity inherited from Page01 through Page03.

fields.name: render_type
fields.description: Typed rendering contract category.

fields.name: source_execution_packet_ids
fields.description: Page03 execution packets used as source evidence.

fields.name: source_trace_ids
fields.description: Stage159 dry-run trace references, not runtime execution output.

fields.name: source_stage
fields.description: Stage authority that produced the rendering contract.

fields.name: surface_channel
fields.description: Novel, drama, synopsis, or other surface channel label.

fields.name: visibility
fields.description: Rendering visibility policy.

fields.name: boundary_level
fields.description: Node boundary level for rendering.

fields.name: render_mode
fields.description: Stage161 is CONTRACT_ONLY and DRY_RUN_RENDER_READY only.

fields.name: created_from
fields.description: Provenance summary, not raw manuscript text.

fields.name: checksum
fields.description: Deterministic checksum for reproducibility.

fields.name: write_policy
fields.description: Write and mutation policy remain disabled.

fields.name: node2_projection_policy
fields.description: Node2 receives only safe rendering summaries.
